title: Vertical Planks & Bricks
description: Place 2 slabs from planks or bricks in the form of a full block to make it looks vertical!
body:
-}VERTICAL PLANKS & BRICKS{-
 

* What does this resource pack do?

 It adds the ability to have vertical wooden planks and bricks in Minecraft
 

* How does it work?

If you place two slabs of any wooden plank, bricks, deepslate tiles, or quartz in the space of one block, you'll see it vertical instead of the natural position.
 

* Do i need Optifine or forge/fabric to make it work?

No you don't, it's 100% vanilla!
 

* Can i use it with other resource packs?

Yes, you can use it with other resource packs, but you'll need to do some tweaks, more info in the readme file!
 

* Can i distribute or share the modified pack?

No, any changes made to work with other resource packs cannot be uploaded to internet, only used for you. (This maintains a fair and respectful use of the work from other creators)
 

* Does this pack works with experimental features?

Yes, it works in 1.20.4 with Tuff slabs and I have plans keep this for future wood and bricks!
